calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176. Telephone: 406-381-1645.

Francisco Torress, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Ike Okwuosa, Property Manager for plaintiff Caristas Management Corporation, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Stan Pugh.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 23, 2018.
Defendant's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 29, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on April 19, 2018.
DOE defendants were dimissed today, May 7, 2018.

Plaintiff submitted the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: The Crosby Hotel Lease Agreement dated 6/9/14..............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: MPPP Change in Client Status Terms dated 8/14/17...........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Resident Bent/Benefit Change Notice dated 12/1/17..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 3/16/18.........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, and against defendant Stan Pugh, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,694.00.
Holdover Damages - $620.12.
Costs - $335.00.

Total: - $2,649.12.

Additionally, plaintiff Caritas Managment Corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 516 O'Farrell Street, Unit #310, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The lease is forfeited.

Counsel STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present, represented by Ike Okwuosa.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Stan Pugh is present.
Attorney Christina Schreiber appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel hold settlement discussions. This case does NOT settle. The trial date of May 7, 2018 remains on calendar.
